name: Bright Data
one_liner: Web data platform offering proxy networks and scraping APIs (Web Unlocker, SERP, Scraping Browser, Web Scraper API, and dataset marketplace) for collecting public web data at scale.
access_notes: Self-serve signup with no credit card required. The Web MCP / API free tier grants 5,000 free requests (credits) per month, auto-renewed, giving working API credentials immediately. API keys are generated from the account control panel Account Settings. Paid usage-based billing applies beyond the free allotment.
api_notes: REST API with Bearer-token auth (Authorization: Bearer <token>) plus a proxy 'Native Access' mode using brd-customer-...-zone-... username/password. Product surface spans Web Unlocker API, SERP API, Scraping Browser (browser automation over CDP/Playwright/Puppeteer), Web Scraper API (sync /scrape and async /trigger endpoints, snapshot polling), pre-built Scrapers library, Functions, and Dataset Marketplace. Also official MCP server. Dozens of platform-specific structured scrapers (web_data_*) plus core scraping endpoints put breadth in the moderate range.
mcp_notes: Vendor ships the official 'Web MCP' server: github.com/brightdata/brightdata-mcp (MIT license), documented at docs.brightdata.com/ai/mcp-server. Requires API_TOKEN env var. Tools include search_engine, scrape_as_markdown, crawl/discover, browser navigation; free tier of 5,000 requests/month, no credit card.
main_blocker: None significant for building an integration; self-serve API key with a free tier is available. Cost/credit consumption is the main practical consideration at scale.

evidence.claim: Authentication uses Bearer API token or proxy username/password (Native Access); main products include Web Unlocker, SERP, Scraping Browser, Scrapers, Functions, Marketplace.
Web Scraper API exposes async /trigger and sync /scrape REST endpoints authenticated with Bearer token.
Official Bright Data MCP server repo (MIT license) provides all-in-one public web access via API_TOKEN.
Web MCP free plan: no credit card required, 5,000 free monthly requests.

open_questions: Exact webhook/notification support for dataset delivery vs. polling; precise op count across all scraper endpoints for BROAD vs MODERATE classification.
